explanatory_strength.rationale: The levered-treasury and equity-financing-cycle mechanism is now sharper: filings show 149% share growth in nine months versus a 10% seven-year dilution assumption, separating financing stress from pure ETH beta. The research loop did not reconcile the two paths into one decision-grade forecast.

evidence_sufficiency.rationale: Round-two research confirmed filing anchors (579.7M shares, $287.6M operating cash use, $92.3M deferred tax) and decisively flagged the dilution-cadence mismatch, but BMNP preferred conversion terms, post-May 2026 ATM pace, and a full senior-claim waterfall remain unresolved.

downside_control.rationale: Near-term liquidity looks supported ($340.3M cash, no term debt), yet research confirmed G&A runs roughly six times staking revenue and operating burn exceeds inflow without new equity; the equity stub has no bounded dilution floor.

return_vs_alternatives.rationale: Base annualized return stays 6.3% per year, below a 12% credit hurdle; the filing-contradicted dilution assumption makes even the 15.1% bull case depend on an issuance slowdown not evidenced in the frozen packet.

claims.claim: Observed issuance cadence (232.4M to 579.7M shares in roughly nine months, +149%) contradicts the eth_trajectory_net_dilution base assumption of 10% cumulative dilution over seven years; the financing-cycle stress path dominates the base payoff build.

Under a no-new-equity stress case, nine-month G&A of $335.7M against $56.9M staking revenue and $287.6M operating cash use confirms owner economics depend on continued equity issuance rather than self-funded treasury operations.

The warrants_tax_preferred_reserve row remains base zero despite $92.3M deferred tax liability (~$0.16 per share) and unresolved BMNP preferred claims; overlap controls are clean but the low case ($8.5 per share total) is not a reconciled senior-claim waterfall.

strongest_counter_explanation: Price at $15.69 sits below May 2026 ETH fair value per share (~$18.76); with $340.3M cash, no operating debt at scale, and potential ATM pause, mNAV could normalize on ETH appreciation without a refinancing event or insolvency.
most_important_missing_fact: BMNP preferred stock conversion terms and post-May 2026 ATM dilution pace reconciled to net ETH per fully diluted common share after all senior claims.
falsifiers: Publish a per-share waterfall netting preferred, warrant, and deferred-tax claims against ETH look-through that bounds common equity.
Two consecutive quarters where ATM issuance dilutes ETH per share faster than token price rises.
Demonstrate corporate G&A and operating burn covered by staking inflow without new equity for two reporting periods.
specialist_findings: Credit cross-check after research loop: near-term survivability is supported by cash and absent term maturities, but the equity-financing cycle is filing-evidenced as aggressive (149% share growth in nine months), base dilution assumptions are contradicted, and the senior-claim stack remains under-modeled; defer until preferred waterfall and post-May issuance are evidenced.
